arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti aims fresh dig at La Liga referees as feud continues
arts.sum: Carlo Ancelotti's war of words with referees in La Liga continues with a sly dig when talking about officiating in the Champions League.

arts.ttl: 'Definitely' - Bernardo Silva clear on penalties after crucial Man City miss
arts.sum: Manchester City star Bernardo Silva spoke about missing a decisive penalty against Real Madrid in the Champions League last season.

arts.ttl: Man City injury news: Pep Guardiola issues Erling Haaland, Ruben Dias, Nathan Ake, Jack Grealish update before Real Madrid clash
arts.sum: Man City manager Pep Guardiola issues an injury update on Erling Haaland, Ruben Dias, Nathan Ake and Jack Grealish ahead of Wednesday's Champions League playoff second-leg clash with Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti responds to Pep Guardiola’s claim that Man City have 1% chance of UCL progression
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti has issued a response to claims on the part of Manchester City counterpart Pep Guardiola that the Sky Blues have only a miniscule chance…

arts.ttl: 'Get it' - Pep Guardiola makes Jack Grealish request after Man City injury boost
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola welcomed a number of faces back into training before Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Man Utd Outcast Has More La Liga Goals Than Lamine Yamal and Vinicius Junior in 2025
arts.sum: Antony already scored more goals than Lamine Yamal and Vinícius Júnior combined in La Liga this year.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid announce squad for Champions League match against Manchester City
arts.sum: Real Madrid have published their squad list for Wednesday’s match against Manchester City in the return leg of the Champions League ’s Round of 32- Available Streaming : Paramount+, Fubo.TV

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs. Man City: Erling Haaland out to make Champions League history, break Lionel Messi record in playoff second leg
arts.sum: Erling Haaland will be aiming to earn a slice of Champions League history when Man City lock horns with Real Madrid at the Santiago Bernabeu for the second leg of their playoff tie on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: “It’s a hoax” – Javier Tebas reacts to reports of Real Madrid leaving La Liga
arts.sum: Real Madrid have become infuriated with the state of refereeing in La Liga over the last couple of weeks, which everyone in Spanish football has become aware.
